scripts.db:migrate: HOME=.wrangler-home wrangler d1 migrations apply health_receiver --remote
scripts.db:recent: HOME=.wrangler-home wrangler d1 execute health_receiver --remote --command "SELECT device_id, exported_at, received_at FROM exports ORDER BY received_at DESC LIMIT 10"
scripts.db:count: HOME=.wrangler-home wrangler d1 execute health_receiver --remote --command "SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM exports"
